TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kari_Seediq, title = Kari_Seediq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kari_Seediq} }

S.FORM: Kari Seediq uxe de kesun daha Kari Seejiq, Kari Taroko we, kari tnpusu na seediq meniq Taywang, kari qnlhangan na Taywang uri. 7000 kana hei ka tnkari Seediq. Alang skari Kari Seediq Taywang ŚćóśäēÁł£ Skangki Dndulan Kari Kari Truku Kari Toda Kari Tgdaya Patis Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Duma kari Seediq Papak == Pnyahan pnataas ==
S.PHON: ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq, ka…ĺi ta…ĺoko w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq m…ôniq tajwaŇč, ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na tajwaŇč u…ĺi. **** kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq tajwaŇč *** skaŇčki dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ĺuku ka…ĺi toda ka…ĺi tgdaja patis pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu duma ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq papak == pnjańßan pnataas ==
S.FORM: Kari Seediq uxe de kesun daha Kari Seejiq, Kari Taroko we, kari tnpusu na seediq meniq Taywang, kari qnlhangan na Taywang uri. 7000 kana hei ka tnkari Seediq. Alang skari Kari Seediq Taywang ŚćóśäēÁł£ Skangki Dndulan Kari Kari Truku Kari Toda Kari Tgdaya Patis Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Duma kari Seediq Papak == Pnyahan pnataas ==
